# Research Archive

This directory stores older research notes that no longer need to stay in the
active `.github/research/` working set.

Archive notes by month under `YYYY-MM/` directories. Keep filenames unchanged
so existing references stay predictable when you update their paths.

## Monthly archives

- [2026-04/](./2026-04/) contains the April 2026 archive set, including older top-level working notes moved out of `.github/research/`.
- [2026-03/](./2026-03/) contains earlier archived research notes.
